member.name: T:Avalonia.Labs.Input.AvaloniaCommands
member.summary: Provides a standard set of application related commands.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.AvaloniaCommands.NotACommand
member.summary: Represents a command which is always ignored.

member.name: T:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CanExecuteRoutedEventArgs
member.summary: Provides data for the routed events.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CanExecuteRoutedEventArgs.Command
member.summary: Gets the routed command that was invoked.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CanExecuteRoutedEventArgs.Parameter
member.summary: Gets data parameter of the command.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CanExecuteRoutedEventArgs.CanExecute
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether the associated with this event can be executed on the command target.

member.name: T:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding
member.summary: Binds a to the event handlers that implement the command.

member.name: F:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.CommandProperty
member.summary: Defines the property.

member.name: F:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.ExecutingCommandProperty
member.summary: Defines the property.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.#ctor(System.Windows.Input.ICommand,System.EventHandler{Avalonia.Labs.Input.ExecutedRoutedEventArgs})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class by using the specified handler.
member.param: Executed handler for the routed command.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.#ctor(System.Windows.Input.ICommand,System.EventHandler{Avalonia.Labs.Input.ExecutedRoutedEventArgs},System.EventHandler{Avalonia.Labs.Input.CanExecuteRoutedEventArgs})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class by using the specified handler.
member.param: Executed handler for the routed command.
Can execute handler for the routed command.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.Command
member.summary: Gets or sets the associated with this CommandBinding.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.ExecutingCommand
member.summary: handler for the routed command.

member.name: E:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.Executed
member.summary: Called when the command is executed.

member.name: E:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding.CanExecute
member.summary: Called to determine if the command can be executed.

member.name: T:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandManager
member.summary: Provides command related utility methods that register objects for class owners and commands, add and remove command event handlers, and provides services for querying the status of a command.

member.name: F:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandManager.CanExecuteEvent
member.summary: Identifies the CanExecute attached event.

member.name: F:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandManager.ExecutedEvent
member.summary: Identifies the Executed attached event.

member.name: F:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandManager.CommandBindingsProperty
member.summary: Defines the property.

member.name: E:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandManager.RequerySuggested
member.summary: Occurs when the detects conditions that might change the ability of a command to execute.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandManager.InvalidateRequerySuggested
member.summary: Invokes RequerySuggested listeners registered on the current thread.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandManager.GetCommandBindings(Avalonia.Input.InputElement)
member.summary: Gets a collection of CommandBinding objects associated with this element. A CommandBinding enables command handling for this element, and declares the linkage between a command, its events, and the handlers attached by this element.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandManager.SetCommandBindings(Avalonia.Input.InputElement,System.Collections.Generic.IList{Avalonia.Labs.Input.CommandBinding})
member.summary: Sets a collection of CommandBinding objects associated with this element. A CommandBinding enables command handling for this element, and declares the linkage between a command, its events, and the handlers attached by this element.

member.name: T:Avalonia.Labs.Input.ExecutedRoutedEventArgs
member.summary: Provides data for the routed event.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.ExecutedRoutedEventArgs.Command
member.summary: Gets the routed command that was invoked.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.ExecutedRoutedEventArgs.Parameter
member.summary: Gets data parameter of the command.

member.name: T:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand
member.summary: Defines a command that implements and is routed through the element tree.

member.name: F:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand._canExecuteChanged
member.summary: The weak collection of delegates for .

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the command.

member.name: P:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand.Gestures
member.summary: Gets the list of object that are associated with this command.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified name.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{Avalonia.Input.KeyGesture})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified name.
member.param: Default input gestures associated with this command.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand.#ctor(System.String,Avalonia.Input.KeyGesture)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified name.
member.param: Default input gestures associated with this command.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand.CanExecute(System.Object,Avalonia.Input.IInputElement)
member.summary: Determines whether this can execute in its current state.
member.returns: true if the command can execute on the current command target; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Labs.Input.RoutedCommand.Execute(System.Object,Avalonia.Input.IInputElement)
member.summary: Executes the RoutedCommand on the current command target.
member.param: User defined parameter to be passed to the handler.
Element at which to begin looking for command handlers.

member.name: T:Avalonia.Utilities.WeakCollection`1
member.summary: A collection of weak references to objects.
member.typeparam: The type of object to hold weak references to.

member.name: F:Avalonia.Utilities.WeakCollection`1._list
member.summary: The actual collection of strongly-typed weak references.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Utilities.WeakCollection`1.GetLiveItems
member.summary: Gets a list of live objects from this collection, causing a purge.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Utilities.WeakCollection`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds a weak reference to an object to the collection. Does not cause a purge.
member.param: The object to add a weak reference to.

member.name: M:Avalonia.Utilities.WeakCollection`1.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes a weak reference to an object from the collection. Does not cause a purge.
member.param: The object to remove a weak reference to.
member.returns: True if the object was found and removed; false if the object was not found.
